product_name: Sweet & Salty Nut Peanut Chewy Granola Bar
ingredients_text: roasted peanuts, corn syrup, sugar, whole grain oats, palm kernel oil, rice flour, vegetable glycerin, whey, peanut butter (peanuts, salt), fructose, canola oil and/or sunflower oil, salt, soy lecithin, peanut flour, corn starch, barley malt extract, honey roasted almond butter (almonds, honey, maltodextrin, palm oil, mixed tocopherols), baking soda, natural flavor, vitamin e (mixed tocopherols) added to retain freshness,
